summary: Iteration 51 - Complete E2E purchase flow testing on mobile (390px). Verified Login → Products → Product Detail → Add to Cart → Cart Page flow. All 10 E2E steps passed. Sticky buy bar regression test passed.

issues: Minor i18n issue: Email verified badge shows 'checkout.emailVerified' translation key instead of translated text

passed_tests: E2E STEP 1: Login with test@example.com / password123 - PASS (redirected to /dashboard)
E2E STEP 2: Navigate to /products - PASS (products grid loaded with 10 products)
E2E STEP 3: Click on product to see detail - PASS (navigated to /products/prod_7889643617d1)
E2E STEP 4: Add to cart from ProductDetailPage - PASS (clicked 'Add to Cart' button)
E2E STEP 5: Verify cart counter in header updates - PASS (cart badge shows count)
E2E STEP 6: Navigate to /cart - PASS (on cart page)
E2E STEP 7: Verify product appears in cart - PASS (1 cart item found)
E2E STEP 8: Verify 'Email verificado' badge - PASS (badge found, shows 'checkout.emailVerified')
E2E STEP 9: Verify shipping addresses section - PASS (1 saved address, 'Add new address' button visible)
E2E STEP 10: Verify checkout button with total price - PASS (button text: 'Passer à la Caisse')
RESPONSIVE: All steps work on mobile 390px viewport - PASS
REGRESSION: Sticky buy bar appears on ProductDetailPage mobile - PASS (visible at top, middle, and bottom scroll positions)
REGRESSION: Sticky bar has price (€24.99), quantity controls, and buy button - PASS
action_items: MINOR: Fix i18n translation for 'checkout.emailVerified' key in CartPage - currently shows raw key instead of translated text
critical_code_review_comments: LoginPage.js: Mobile-first design working correctly with email/password login
ProductsPage.js: Products grid loads correctly on mobile with 2-column layout
ProductDetailPage.js: Mobile sticky buy bar (data-testid='mobile-buy-bar') working correctly - fixed at bottom with price, quantity controls, and buy button
CartPage.js: All sections render correctly - cart items, email verified badge, shipping addresses, order summary, checkout button
Header.js: Cart counter badge (data-testid='mobile-cart-count') updates correctly when items added
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 51 completed full E2E purchase flow testing on mobile (390px). Key findings: 1) Login flow works correctly with email/password. 2) Products page shows 10 products in 2-column grid. 3) Product detail page has working sticky buy bar at bottom with price, quantity controls, and 'Acheter Maintenant' button. 4) Add to cart updates header cart badge. 5) Cart page shows: cart items, email verified badge (minor i18n issue - shows key), shipping address section with 1 saved address, order summary with subtotal/shipping/total, and checkout button. 6) All responsive features working on 390px mobile viewport. 7) App is currently in French locale.

mobile_390px.step_2_products: PASS - Products grid with 10 products, 2-column layout
mobile_390px.step_3_product_detail: PASS - URL: /products/prod_7889643617d1, shows olive oil product
mobile_390px.step_4_add_to_cart: PASS - 'Add to Cart' button works, also 'Buy Now' redirects to cart
mobile_390px.step_5_cart_counter: PASS - Header cart badge updates with item count
mobile_390px.step_7_product_in_cart: PASS - Cart item visible with image, name, quantity, price
mobile_390px.step_9_shipping_addresses: PASS - Section visible with 1 saved address and 'Add new address' button
mobile_390px.step_10_checkout_button: PASS - Button text: 'Passer à la Caisse', not disabled
